style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, structured card layout, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background.overlay: subtle orthogonal grid pattern of thin straight lines at very low opacity (2-3%), spaced 60px apart horizontally and vertically, matching the website's signature blueprint-style background grid — no hexagonal, no diagonal, strictly rectangular

headline.position: top center, above the main illustration
headline.style: clean geometric sans-serif, tight letter-spacing (-0.04em), matching the website's heading style exactly
headline.size: extra large, dominant headline, approximately 15-20% of image height
headline.effects: none — clean white text on dark background, no glow, no shadow, relying on contrast alone as the website does

subtitle.style: clean geometric sans-serif, matching nav link styling
subtitle.effects: none — uses the website's text-secondary color for visual hierarchy, clean and muted

text_overlay.hierarchy: headline in white is primary, subtitle in muted gray (#8A8F98) creates the same primary/secondary text hierarchy used throughout the website

ui_windows.type: main card panel — Cowork task view
ui_windows.style: white (#FFFFFF) filled rectangle with 1px solid border in rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px (--radius-md), very subtle shadow (0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)), no frosted glass, no blur, flat and clean
ui_windows.details: central main card showing a simplified Cowork interface: at the top a small pill-shaped badge (border-radius 999px, light background, 1px border) reading 'Projektplanung aktiv' with a small gold dot (#FFD166) — below that, a structured todo list with checkmark icons: two items marked complete in #06D6A0 (Zeitplan erstellt, Materialien vorbereitet), one in-progress item with a #FFD166 dot (Teilnehmer-Gruppen einteilen), and one pending item in #8A8F98 (Feedback-Formulare erstellen). Clean 14px text, 12px spacing between items, matching the website's card and badge patterns

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, same flat card treatment as the website's .card class
ui_windows.details: compact Kanban board with three columns separated by 1px vertical dividers: 'Planung' header in #118AB2, 'In Arbeit' in #FFD166, 'Erledigt' in #06D6A0 — each column header uses uppercase 12px text with 0.05em letter-spacing (matching the website's .footer-heading and .sg-label style). Below each header, 2-3 small inner cards (white, 1px border, 6px radius matching --radius-sm) with short task titles in 14px and small tag badges

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, flat card
ui_windows.details: compact Gantt chart with horizontal time axis. Bars are flat solid fills — #118AB2 for planning phase, #FFD166 for active phase, #06D6A0 for completed milestones. Small diamond shapes mark milestones. Time labels in 12px #8A8F98. The bars have border-radius 6px (--radius-sm) on their ends. No gradients on bars, solid flat color only

ui_windows.style: three overlapping white rectangles with 1px borders and 12px radius, stacked with slight offset (8px horizontal, 8px vertical), representing layered documents
ui_windows.details: the topmost document shows a miniature slide layout (simple heading + bar chart placeholder), the middle shows a spreadsheet grid with colored cells, the bottom shows a text document outline — all rendered as flat white cards with fine borders, no frosted glass, matching the website's clean card aesthetic

icons.style: small circles (8-10px diameter) with a 2px solid border ring, matching the website's badge-dot pattern: #06D6A0 fill for completed, #FFD166 fill for active, #118AB2 fill for queued — no glow, no frosted rings, simple flat dots
icons.details: 5 small status dots connected by thin 1px lines (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) to the main card panel, each with a tiny label in 11px #8A8F98 (Dateien, Slides, Zeitplan, Ressourcen, Berichte) — representing Cowork's parallel sub-agents. The connecting lines are straight or gently curved, not flowing or animated-looking
icons.position: distributed around the left and bottom edges of the main card panel

decorative.style: thin solid strokes (1px) in rgba(255,255,255,0.12), with small arrow tips, no gradient, no glow — matching the website's use of fine border lines for structural separation
decorative.details: clean straight paths with right-angle turns (not curved) connecting the main Cowork card to the Kanban board, Gantt chart, and output stack — resembling a simple flowchart or org-chart connector, structural rather than decorative

decorative.style: outline only in rgba(255,255,255,0.25), 1px stroke weight, minimalist line art matching the website's SVG icon style (20×20px viewBox, stroke-width 2, stroke-linecap round)
decorative.details: small symbols: a calendar grid (scheduling), a checklist (task tracking), a simple network node (dependencies), a bar chart (reporting) — placed as subtle ambient elements in the background areas between the main cards. No glow, no fill, purely structural outlines

decorative.style: circular rings with 2px stroke in #06D6A0, matching the website's agenda-number style (circle with border, centered content)
decorative.details: two small progress rings — one 75% filled in #06D6A0, one 40% filled in #FFD166 — positioned near the Kanban board. Inside each ring, a small percentage number in 11px white. Clean and flat, no glow

decorative.style: pill-shaped badges (border-radius 999px) with 1px border and transparent fill, matching the website's .badge component exactly — small text inside
decorative.details: three small tags reading '.xlsx', '.pptx', '.docx' floating near the output stack. Each has a subtle left-side color dot (badge-dot style): #EF476F for .xlsx, #118AB2 for .pptx, #06D6A0 for .docx. Font-size 11px, font-weight 500

composition.layout: headline 'Projektmanagement' and subtitle 'Claude Cowork' at top center; main Cowork task card positioned center-left as focal anchor; Kanban board card to the upper right; Gantt timeline card to the lower right; document output stack at bottom center-left; sub-agent dots distributed along left edge of main card
composition.depth: subtle z-axis layering through shadow depth only (not blur or opacity). Text on topmost layer with no effects. Main card slightly forward with 2px shadow. Satellite cards at same depth with 1px shadows. Decorative elements flat in background. Minimal depth — the website uses almost flat design with barely-there shadows
composition.negative_space: generous space reserved at top for headline and subtitle (top 25%), wide breathing room between all cards (minimum 24px gaps matching the website's grid gap), dark background grid visible between panels

technical.text: Headline: Projektmanagement | Subtitle: Claude Cowork — both in Switzer font, fully readable, high contrast against #073B4C background
technical.no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, stock photo elements, competitor logos, cluttered overlapping, terminal/command line interface, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, frosted glass, backdrop blur, glow effects, neon effects, gradient fills on surfaces, rounded blob shapes, organic shapes

color_palette.background: #073B4C (deep navy — the website's --secondary brand color, used for dark sections)
color_palette.text_primary: #FFFFFF (white — inverted from the website's #111111 for dark background context)
color_palette.text_secondary: #8A8F98 (muted gray — identical to the website's --text-secondary, used for subtitles and labels)
color_palette.card_fill: #FFFFFF (white — matching the website's --bg-base for card surfaces)
color_palette.card_border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) (light border — adapted from the website's #eaeaea for dark background)
color_palette.accent: #FFD166 (golden yellow — the website's --accent, used for primary buttons and active states)
color_palette.secondary: #073B4C (deep navy — already the background, used for inner contrast elements)
color_palette.info: #118AB2 (ocean blue — the website's --info, used for links and informational elements)
color_palette.success: #06D6A0 (mint — the website's --success, used for completed states)
color_palette.warning: #EF476F (coral pink — the website's --warning, used sparingly for attention)
color_palette.surface: #fafafa (light surface — the website's --bg-surface, used inside card sub-elements like badge backgrounds)
color_palette.border_radius: 6px for small elements (--radius-sm), 12px for cards (--radius-md), 999px for pill badges
